summary: Applied the private OpenBao runtime live on docker-runtime-lv3, configured its PostgreSQL dynamic credential backend on postgres-lv3, seeded scoped controller and mail secrets, and verified Transit and database credential issuance end to end.

verification.observed: make converge-openbao completed successfully from the main integration worktree after stabilizing active-node waiting, AppRole artifact refresh, and the end-to-end PostgreSQL credential verification flow.
The converge verified the ops userpass login plus controller-automation and mail-platform AppRole reads against the seeded Proxmox API and mail runtime secret paths.
The controller-automation AppRole successfully encrypted and decrypted a managed test payload through the Transit engine.
OpenBao issued a postgres-readonly credential and the final verification play authenticated to postgres-lv3 with that short-lived username and password.

notes: The live workflow maintains controller-local recovery material under .local/openbao/, including the init payload, named-user passwords, and refreshed short-lived AppRole artifacts.

The current managed access path uses the loopback HTTP listener on 127.0.0.1:8201 for automation and operator forwarding, while a step-ca-backed TLS listener is also present on :8200 for follow-on mTLS work.
